content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1533: Restlessly Impatient

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

“Clark! Did you get them?”

Xiao Lie of the Heavenly Craftsmen Clan shouted from behind a magnetic field. Six or seven Territory Ancestor Realm experts stood behind him impatiently.

Clark looked a little embarrassed. His secret treasure trembled as if it couldn’t accurately work when they came to this area.

“If you don’t mind, let Grandmaster check it for you. If it’s broken, he may help you fix it,” suggested Jia Ni, her voice soft and her eyes deep.

Just like Xiao Lie, Jia Ni wasn’t from the Seven Great Clans. However, she had a noble position. She was Judy’s sworn sister.

Jia Ni was from Secret Pattern Tribe. In the Sea Domain of Nihility, although this tribe didn’t have many members, most of them had high realms. Because of the relationship between Jia Ni and Judy, Secret Pattern Tribe and Mysterious Sky Clan had a good relationship. However, Secret Pattern Tribe wasn’t dependent on Mysterious Sky Clan.

Jia Ni was slim and her round bosom was covered in beautiful armor. She left her arms, straight legs, and neck exposed. Mysterious and complicated patterns were spread all over her exposed skin. Those patterns were formed naturally like rivers, flowers, and fingerprints. All of them looked so beautiful.

Her picturesque face was filled with magical dark green and violet patterns that looked like real blooming flowers on her cheeks. Those patterns didn’t affect her appearance but increase her strange beauty. However, such beauty wasn’t something ordinary people could touch.

Jia Ni’s eyes were deep as she sneered. While talking to Neptune and his peers, she sounded arrogant.

She was at First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm and cultivating peculiar Secret Pattern techniques. She had been in this realm for many years as she had broken through earlier than Neptune and Keith. Even experts at Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm had to be wary of her.

“Clark, if your secret treasure is broken, you may ask Grandmaster Xiao Lie to check it for you,” Neptune shouted when he saw that Clark couldn’t find the right direction. He had become impatient.

“What’s wrong with it?” frowned Keith from the Ancient Monster Clan.

Clark was also worried. As he had no other option around, he handed the needle to Xiao Lie and said, “Grandmaster, please handle it with care...”

Xiao Lie had a disheveled, flaming-red hair. He received the needle, a scorching flame shooting from his palm. That flame covered the needle and burnt it. Xiao Lie’s face turned red as the flame reflected on it. He concentrated and showed his grandmaster’s style.

His hands changed and created many magical flaming seals. Some looked like flowers, fruits, or even spirits. Those seals carried his life energy and were created with the flaming power.

Many seals were imprinted on the needle. The needle sizzled for a while before turning into a blazing gold thing.

The needle sounded loudly and then smoked, which smelled sour.

“This secret treasure has a lot of dregs from your body. It was contaminated. That’s why the magnetic field could affect it easily.” Xiao Lie’s hands clapped and countless flaming seals disappeared into his palms. The needle turned into a beam of gold light and fell into Clark’s hand. “If you don’t have anything to do, don’t play with it. Your hands sweat and your sweat has pollutants. The materials to refine this delicate Detective Spirit Needle are all precious. Due to its exquisite features, it can’t endure dregs.”

Clark of the Ancient Monster Clan was scolded but he still wore a servile face. He used the God power to create a hand to receive the needle. He checked it and became instantly thrilled, smiling continuously, “Thanks Grandmaster for teaching me.”

Then, the needle pointed to a direction.

It was the dead star where Shi Yan and Forefather Dragon Lizard were hiding.

That dead star was covered inside layers of gray mists. If they didn’t look carefully, they could ignore it between so many clear and prominent stars.

Zi Yao’s energy had concealed the star and made it seem like it was erased. Initially, She wanted to extract and swallow Forefather Dragon Lizard’s essence blood, so she didn’t want anybody to find this star.

Without Clark’s needle, they were going to need a lot of time to find that dead star.

After confirming the location, Neptune, Xiao Lie, Jia Ni, and the warriors who weren’t afraid of death surfed through the beautiful galaxy. Shortly after, they landed on that misty planet.

Entering the mist, their faces changed. Looking at the bands of dazzling lights above the planet underneath, they became solemn.

The world under the layers of mist was unexpectedly beautiful. Each of the light curtains made of the patterns on Zi Yao’s real body was full of earth-breaking energy.

With their realms, they couldn’t pierce through that massive light net to enter the continent underneath. They didn’t know what was going on down there.

However, they could feel clearly two distinct soul threats from the dead star, which terrified them.

That soul-pressing feeling wasn’t something that the light curtains could hinder. The experts at the Territory Ancestor Realm all felt intimidation from Yuan Zu and Zi Yao.

“I’m afraid two scary existences are fighting down there. Their fearful auras aren’t less than the Ten Great Territory Ancestors...”

Jia Ni of the Secret Pattern Tribe looked bitter. She sighed and halted, not daring to move further.

Closing her eyes, the beautiful patterns on her left arm revived and wiggled strangely. She was using a secret technique, which used her patterns to explore the situation underneath.

People then all saw the green patterns on Jia Ni’s left arm became a deep eye, which looked so magical. They knew that those eyes could see through everything.

The green eye looked like a tattoo on Jia Ni’s creamy arm, which was realistic, indeed.

All of a sudden, a drop of crimson blood appeared on the corner of the eye!

Jia Ni was shaken hard. The blood-dripping eye shattered and returned to so many thick patterns. Then, they scattered on all over Jia Ni’s left arm.

“Two... Two...”

Jia Ni stammered. Her voice suddenly turned sharp, her eyes mixed between fearful and excited.

“What?”

The others asked as they didn’t have a clue. They demanded a clear explanation.

“Two of them! There are two Absolute Beginning creatures at the same level. They’re fighting down there!” Jia Ni shouted, her voice strange. She was extremely excited and content that she didn’t mind the trickle of blood on the corner of her mouth.

Actually, the drop of blood on her mouth was the one on the eyes tattooed on her left arm...

She had used blood to activate the secret technique to see the situation underneath the barrier. However, because of the two Absolute Beginning creatures, she had forgotten her pain.

Desire and greed had shrouded her and everybody here.

“Oh Gosh! Two Absolute Beginning creatures! It could take thousands or tens of thousands of years just to see one. But now, we’re about to see two!”

“They’re fighting! It’s a chance that happens only once in a blue moon!”

“Yeah! There’s no chance better than this! Haha. We shouldn’t rush. After they fight, we will get in there and harvest!”

“When luck comes, you can’t stop it! Hahaha!”

“Guys, let’s discuss. How should we share them?”

As they had chased after them from the Empty Land to his area, they were so enthusiastic, their faces blushed and their eyes greedy. They acted as if they had already killed the two Absolute Beginning creatures and they were about to share the treasures.

They were about to get a frenzy even when they hadn’t gotten through the mist yet. It showed the attractiveness of the Absolute Beginning creatures to the warriors.

“If so, Jia Ni got the first merit! She’s the powerful expert cultivating the marvelous secret pattern technique!” Xiao Lie laughed. He was content as if he had already seen a new Absolute Beginning divine weapon and his name was known to every people in later eras.

“Is Shi Yan one of the two Absolute Beginning creatures?” asked Neptune.

His words attracted people immediately. They all turned to Jia Ni and waited for her confirmation. They had vaguely guessed that Shi Yan wasn’t one of them. Since Shi Yan had just refined his Absolute Beginning body, he wasn’t a real Absolute Beginning creature.

However, he didn’t experience that ancient, destructive era, so he didn’t have the immense knowledge of an Absolute Beginning creature.

Without these features, he wasn’t a real Absolute Beginning creature. Shi Yan was just an expert who had cultivated his body to the level of Absolute Beginning creatures.

“No, not him. I’m sure he isn’t one of them!” Jia Ni confirmed. “Those two have archaic auras that only Absolute Beginning creatures have. Only creatures that have lived for billions of years could have such ancient auras. They are two real Absolute Beginning creatures!”

Listening to her, everybody rubbed their hands eagerly.

“Calm down! Don’t rush! Don’t rush!” Keith shouted to calm the others to not let their auras alert the Absolute Beginning creatures down there.

“Right. We should seize the chance when they haven’t finished their battle to discuss how to deal with them.” Neptune rubbed his chin, his eyes sinister as he sneered. “We should divide into two teams to deal with each of them. I suggest that Keith, Labitte and I form one team and you guys from Empty Land form the other team.”

“Not a problem!”

“Let’s do it!”

“Excellent!”
